title: Fixed Length of Subfield
text: Fixed Length of Subfield The length of fixed-length subfields in characters, excluding separators. Technical Name: OCCLEN Expected Value: Numeric Default Value: None Description If a field supports fixed-length subfields, you can specify the number of characters allotted to one instance of the subfield, excluding separators. If there is a value specified in the Fixed Length of Field field, the value is used as the default because Uniface assumes you have not defined subfields. Applies To Modeled Field Interface Related Links Fixed Length of Field Physical length of the field in the database, in characters. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
